---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Open notebook '...' in Google Colab
2. Configure with '...' settings
3. Run cell '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened, including any error messages.

## Screenshots/Logs
If applicable, add screenshots or copy-paste error logs.

## Environment
- Google Colab version: [e.g., Colab Pro, Free tier]
- Python version: [e.g., 3.10]
- Notebook: [e.g., 02_transcribe_asr.ipynb]
- Date: [e.g., March 30, 2025]

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.
